provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content:
1. Short title
This Act may be cited as the Protected Names Act.

provisions.title: Interpretation
provisions.content:
2. Interpretation
In this Act—
"protected name" means any of the names or words specified in the First Schedule, and includes any abbreviation of any such name or word.

definitions.definition: any of the names or words specified in the First Schedule, and includes any abbreviation of any such name or word.
